Home / Services / HVAC Maintenance

HVAC Maintenance

Preventative care to keep your system running efficiently through brutal Phoenix summers.

Phoenix's extreme heat and dust storms put extraordinary strain on HVAC systems. Our bi-annual maintenance plans are designed specifically for Valley homeowners to prevent costly breakdowns when you need cooling most.

Each visit includes 32-point inspection and service: cleaning condenser coils clogged with desert dust, checking refrigerant levels, testing electrical components, and calibrating thermostats. We'll alert you to minor issues before they become major repairs.

Spring tune-ups are especially critical to prepare systems for summer stress. Fall checkups help identify any wear from the punishing season. Maintenance plan members receive priority scheduling and 15% discounts on repairs.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Comprehensive system inspection and performance testing
  2. 02 Step 2: Cleaning of all critical components
  3. 03 Step 3: Lubrication of moving parts and electrical safety checks
  4. 04 Step 4: Detailed report with recommendations

Benefits

  • Extends system lifespan by 3-5 years
  • Maintains peak energy efficiency
  • Reduces emergency repair needs by 80%
  • Priority service for plan members

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I service my AC in Phoenix?

We recommend twice yearly - before summer (March-April) and after peak season (October-November). Systems work much harder here than in milder climates.

What's included in a maintenance visit?

Full system inspection, coil cleaning, refrigerant check, thermostat calibration, electrical testing, and detailed report with photos of any concerns.

Can maintenance really lower my energy bills?

Absolutely. A dirty system can use 15-20% more energy. Proper maintenance keeps it running at peak efficiency despite our extreme temperatures.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with hvac maintenance? Contact us today.
